overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt exploring the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair. The character ascends stone stairs along a waterfront, explores a scenic overlook, runs through cobblestone streets, and passes through a grand archway into a town square with a central fountain. Bright sunny weather with clear skies throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending from street to waterfront walkway

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs from street level

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs from cobblestone street toward upper waterfront walkway

entered.detail: cobblestone pavement with grass growing between stones
wide stone staircase ascending alongside a building
distinctive building with yellow walls and bright blue trim and columns
stone balustrade overlooking water visible to the right of the stairs
purple and red flowering plants along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character begins at street level on a cobblestone road and ascends a wide stone staircase. A distinctive yellow building with blue architectural details dominates the view ahead, while flowering bushes line the path. The camera follows from behind as the character climbs toward an upper waterfront walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded waterfront walkway along stone cliff face

events.description: character reaches end of waterfront path and turns around to return

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront walkway, passing an NPC, then turning back toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing walking past the character near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall gothic spires of a distant castle visible above the cliff
tall rocky cliff wall across the water with greenery
turquoise water visible between the railing and cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded waterfront walkway with a stone railing overlooking turquoise water and a cliff face. The yellow building now passes by on the left. After reaching the end of the path near some wooden crates, the character turns around to head back, passing a villager NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with stone retaining walls and flower beds

events.description: character descends stairs and transitions to running through streets
character runs past pedestrians while navigating the cobblestone streets

agents.ego_description: running down from the upper level and sprinting through the town streets, passing villagers

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking along the street
villager standing near a stone wall with flowers

entered.detail: tall stone wall with red brick accents supporting the upper level
cluster of colorful buildings with red tile roofs in the distance
blue mountain range visible in the far background
yellow flags hanging from poles over the street

segments.scene_description: The character descends the stairs and breaks into a run through the cobblestone streets. Passing by stone retaining walls and flower beds, the character navigates around pedestrians while the view opens up to show distant mountains and town buildings with yellow banners overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone road ascending hillside with panoramic mountain and lake views

events.description: view opens up to reveal expansive distant mountains and lake beyond the town

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the winding cobblestone road with scenic views of mountains and water

entered.detail: large body of blue water visible between the hills in the distance
low stone building with three rounded arches and a red tile roof

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the cobblestone road as the environment opens up to panoramic views. A stone building with arches passes by on the left while the distant mountains and a large lake become clearly visible in the bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone archway entrance to town square with armored guards

events.description: passing through the large stone archway into the inner town square
emerging from the shadow of the archway into bright sunlight of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the imposing stone archway into the town square, passing between two armored guards

notable_agents.action: armored guard in blue and silver armor standing at the archway entrance
armored guard in blue and silver armor standing at the archway entrance

entered.detail: large weathered stone archway with thick walls and ivy growing on the sides
cluster of vibrant orange and yellow buildings with balconies and red roofs
lush plantings of red and purple flowers lining the archway entrance
stone fountain with multiple tiers becoming visible in the plaza ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a massive stone archway flanked by armored guards and flower beds. Moving from the bright exterior into the shadow of the arch, the scene transitions to the sunlit town square beyond, where colorful Mediterranean-style buildings and a central fountain come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with central fountain and colorful Mediterranean-style buildings

events.description: character circles around the central fountain in the town square

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square, circling the central fountain and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: elderly man with a cane and purple hat walking through the square

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open town square, walking around the central stone fountain. The square is surrounded by colorful buildings with balconies and red tile roofs. Various NPCs including an elderly man with a cane populate the area as the character moves through the cobblestone plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow waterfront ascent into the expansive, sun-drenched heart of a Mediterranean city. It begins at street level, following the character up a wide stone staircase past flowering bushes and a vibrant yellow building toward a shaded waterfront walkway overlooking turquoise water. As the character turns back and descends the stairs, the pace quickens into a run through cobblestone streets where the view opens up to reveal distant mountains and yellow banners fluttering overhead. The scene then expands further as the camera passes a stone arched building and glides through a massive stone gateway guarded by armored soldiers, transitioning from the shadow of the arch into a bright, open plaza. Finally, the movement settles into the town square, circling a central stone fountain surrounded by colorful buildings with red tile roofs and strolling pedestrians.
